calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 No Appearance; Order To Arrest
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Martin Moreno, Esq. appearing for ARCHTOUCH, LLC, Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Paige Dimakos.

On calendar for Order for Examination as to DEFENDANT PAIGE DIMAKOS, No Appearance by defendant. At last calling of the case, defendant Dimakos did not appear and a bench warrant letter was issued with a continuance for today with a warning that If No Appearance by the defendant today, a Bench Warrant would be issued. Bench Warrant issued in the amount of $500.00.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk J. Rumsey; Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229. (514)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Continued For Letter To Nov-22-22 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for order of examination as to Defendants Paige Dimakos and Draft Network, LLC.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not Recorded

Plaintiff Airtouch, LLC represented by Martin Moreno, Esq.
Defendant The Draft Network, LLC not appearing.
Defendant Paige Dimakos not appearing.

Plaintiff contends that Defendant and it's attorney indicated they were not going to appear.
Plaintiff's request to issue bench warrant is denied.

Court orders matter continued for further order of examination and issues a bench warrant letter.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Summary Of The Case In Support Of Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant The Draft Network LLC A Florida Limited Liability Company Dept. 514.

Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:35:42 a.m. and concluding at 11:06 a.m.

Grant Waterkotte, Esq. appeared for appeared for plaintiff Arctouch, LLC, a limited liability company via Zoom.

Devin Dingler, CFO and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom.

No appearance by defendant The Draft Network, LLC

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money Due on Equipment Finance Agreement and for Attorney Fees was filed 7/13/2021, and personally served on defendant 8/7/21

Defaults entered as to each defendant were entered on 3/22/22.

DOE defendants were dismissed 3/22/22.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Arctouch, LLC, a limited liability company, and against the defaulted The Draft Network, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $354,565.95

Prejudgment Interest - $16,231.90.

Attorney Fees - Waived

Costs - Waived

Total - $370,797.85

Order signed after Court.
